title: Overheard Discs
description: A mod that adds a few more music discs.
body:
A mod that currently adds 1 music disc called Interesting Night to the game. I made the music myself and i hope everyone else will enjoy.
Now also added a villager profession selling the music disc for 15 emeralds and 1 blank music disc. (for fabric theres a bug that makes the trade 1 emerald and 1 blank disc still trouble shooting)

The mod is only supported for Neoforge 1.21.4-1.21.10, Forge 1.20.1, Fabric 1.21.8 for now.

All versions may have problems with the version numbering if it crashes try the version thats on the name of the mod file
